title: Casamo: Stay Audits for Remote Workers
description: Built an AI-powered travel decision tool that helps remote workers find quality long-stay accommodations, with automated scanning, payments, and analytics.
seoTitle: Casamo Case Study | AI Stay Audit Product
seoDescription: How Casamo helps remote workers find quality long-stay accommodations with automated listing scans, stay audits, payments, analytics, and evidence-backed reports.
constraints: The product needed a sharper promise than broad AI travel planning.
The core workflow had to feel worth paying for before adding broad travel-planning features.
Marketplace filters could not be trusted on their own, so the product had to show evidence, uncertainty, and questions to ask the host.
problem: Remote workers booking 2-8 week furnished stays face a high-cost decision with low-trust marketplace data. A listing can claim Wi-Fi, workspace, kitchen, or laundry without proving that the stay will actually work for weeks of living and working.

The original apartment-search prototype proved that listing evidence could be checked, but Casamo needed to become a real product: a clear promise, a useful trip-planning flow, saved reports, and a way to charge for the result.
The business risk was building a generic Airbnb search clone. The useful wedge was smaller and clearer: scan a shortlist across marketplaces and show which stays have enough evidence to trust.
solution: Positioned Casamo as a stay-decision guide for remote workers, focused on evidence-backed audits instead of broad travel planning.
Built the web intake for destination, dates, guests, budget, listing cap, and must-haves such as Wi-Fi, workspace, kitchen, washer, AC, quiet, and elevator.
Created a report flow that checks Airbnb and Booking.com options, compares the strongest candidates, saves the result, and gives the traveler a practical next step.
Added a $29 Trip Scan Pass, user accounts, saved reports, usage limits, and product analytics so the MVP could start learning from real customers.
Launched the product at casamo.app with the background processing needed for longer listing scans.
result: Casamo gives remote workers a clearer path from a noisy search to a long-stay accommodation they can book with more confidence.
The product can run a destination/date scan, audit Airbnb and Booking.com candidates, and return one recommended pick, two backups, evidence, concerns, and host questions.
The product now has the core commercial loop around automated scanning, saved reports, payments, usage limits, and analytics.
The case study shows the full founder-style path: choose a niche, shape the product, build the MVP, price it, launch it, and keep the recommendation auditable.
deliveryHighlights: $29 Trip Scan Pass with account access and usage limits
Airbnb and Booking.com scan flow with saved reports
Evidence-backed report with recommended pick, backups, host questions, and proof panels
